info.name: Society Management System - Complete API
info.description: Comprehensive API collection for all 32 features with pre-configured requests and authentication

item.name: 1️⃣ SETUP & AUTHENTICATION
item.description: Setup collection by creating test users and obtaining auth tokens

item.name: 2️⃣ GATE & VISITOR MANAGEMENT
item.description: Features 1-12: Visitor management, OTP, QR codes, deliveries, packages, vehicles, blacklist, alerts, reports

item.name: 3️⃣ RESIDENT & VEHICLE TRACKING
item.description: Features 13-16: Member directory, vehicle registration, sticker verification

item.name: 4️⃣ COMPLAINTS & TASKS
item.description: Features 17-20: Complaint management, status updates, photos, task tracking

item.name: 5️⃣ SAFETY & PATROLLING
item.description: Features 21-24: Patrol logging, incident reporting, SOS, emergency drills

item.name: 6️⃣ ATTENDANCE & SHIFTS
item.description: Features 25-28: Check-in/out, shifts, leave requests, salary
